entity.summary: Seychelles-linked centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2018 and referenced by the Seychelles Financial Services Authority in January 2026.
entity.notes: Independent profiles place establishment in 2018. Reviewed Seychelles regulator material links the BitStorage name and domain to a Seychelles company. The current platform operator remains unclear, so confidence stays medium.

events.title: BitStorage exchange established
events.description: BitStorage was established in 2018 as a centralized cryptocurrency exchange and later operated through the bitstorage.finance domain.
events.notes: The reviewed independent sources agree on the 2018 year but do not establish an exact launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level date placeholder.

evidence.title: BitStorage official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current BitStorage identity and active exchange interface but does not establish the current legal operator.

evidence.title: Seychelles FSA notice concerning BitStorage
evidence.notes: Reviewed regulator material links the BitStorage domain to a Seychelles company and records its corporate and authorisation status.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for BitStorage
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the active BitStorage exchange identity.

evidence.title: CoinGecko BitStorage exchange profile
evidence.notes: CoinGecko identifies BitStorage as a centralized exchange established in 2018.

evidence.title: CoinCodex BitStorage exchange profile
evidence.notes: Independent profile also identifies a 2018 launch; its domicile claim is treated as secondary to the regulator-backed Seychelles linkage.
